overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic covered urban plaza at night. The scene features prominent Arasaka corporate branding, neon pink and green lighting, large digital billboards, and scattered pedestrians in a cyberpunk setting.

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking ahead leading the way through the walkway

modern glass facade building with illuminated interior levels
trees with green foliage planted along the walkway edge
green and pink neon lights illuminating the walkway entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a character walking through a covered urban walkway at night. The environment features modern glass buildings on the left, decorative trees on the right, and neon lighting. The camera follows a person in white clothing who is walking ahead through the corridor.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide covered plaza featuring prominent Arasaka corporate signage overhead. Large digital billboards line the right side displaying advertisements, while pink neon kiosks appear on the left. The plaza floor is scattered with litter, and potted palm trees line the walkway. The person in white continues walking ahead through the moderate crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza corridor with digital advertising screens and neon structures

events.description: futuristic parked vehicle comes into view in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking past pink neon kiosks and digital billboards while approaching a parked vehicle

dark modern building with geometric patterns and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the plaza corridor passing by pink neon kiosks on the left and large digital billboards on the right. The Arasaka sign is now behind, and a modern building facade appears on the left. A futuristic parked vehicle becomes visible in the distance ahead as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with parked vehicle and seating benches

events.description: ego character walks past the parked futuristic vehicle on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking past the parked car and seated pedestrians on benches to the right

notable_agents.action: seated NPC in red pants eating on a bench next to the parked car

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and walks past the futuristic parked vehicle on the right side of the plaza. A seated NPC in red pants is visible on a bench eating. The digital billboards and neon kiosks are now behind as the character continues toward the end of the plaza corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic covered walkway that expands into a corporate urban plaza filled with neon lights. It begins by following a person in white clothing through a corridor flanked by modern glass buildings and decorative trees. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a wide plaza dominated by overhead Arasaka signage, where the environment shifts to include pink neon kiosks and large digital billboards lining the litter-strewn floor. The scene then progresses past these glowing advertisements and the corporate branding, revealing a modern building facade on the left and a futuristic vehicle parked in the distance. Finally, the camera glides past the parked vehicle and a seated figure in red pants before continuing toward the far end of the plaza corridor.
